ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-14-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-02-2022 Continued To Dec-14-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michelle Philo, via Zoom, for Celeste A. Feisel, Personal Representative.

Counsel reports of delays caused by locating and confirming retirement accounts but advises that a petition is nearly ready to file and requests a continuance. The court advises that it is inclined to grant the request for a continuance but that the court will be expecting the filing of either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration by the next calling.

The Status hearing is continued to Dec-14-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-28-2022 Continued To Nov-02-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-14-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michelle Philo, via ZOOM, for Celesta Avon Feisel, Petitioner.

The court at the outset queries counsel if she is aware of any objections to this petition. Counsel confirms that there are none and no objections are presented. The court then states that it is waiving defects in notice.
There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Celesta Avon Feisel is appointed Administrator of the estate with Limited Authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for 9/28/2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
